difficulty_note: Short Rocket tower battle after the Giovanni command-floor payoff. It should be tense but easier than Giovanni.

player_side.story_support: Red blocks the stairwell while Antman clears the Rocket guard holding Mr. Fuji.

slots.role: fast tower pressure and classic Rocket identity
Moonlight-adjacent dream pressure without making Moonlight the battle owner

opponent.intent: keep Mr. Fuji away from the Poke Flute and preserve Rocket's control over the Snorlax roadblock
